title: Can we include a dropdown selection in the calendar view?
excerpt: we have a form and calendar to request classroom reservation. the calendar only shows the item name (our course name). I need to also show which room has been assigned. Is there a way to add this to the calendar along wi…

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
we have a form and calendar to request classroom reservation. the calendar only shows the item name (our course name). I need to also show which room has been assigned. Is there a way to add this to the calendar along with the item name?

image1357×263 6.71 KB

image738×178 16.2 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gerald!

One workaround I’d suggest is to use a new Status Column instead of a Dropdown Column. You can make the room names into status labels and that way you can include it in the Calendar.

What do you think about this?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Funny! I had to go to lunch before I figured it out. That’s exactly what I did! Great minds think alike!
Thank you.
